reviewWorkloadForecast.suggestedSplit: Sequential implementation phases with manual checkpoints: Phase 1 contracts + registry, Phase 2 internal executor + router E2E, Phase 3 tests and verification. These are not separate PRs unless explicitly requested.

workUnits.goal: Rename public tool contracts and update registry
workUnits.notes: Adds COMPASS_TRANSFER/COMPASS_SWAP names, updated schemas with userConfirmedRisk, removes deprecated tools from public list. Stop for user review after this phase.

workUnits.goal: Extract internal executor and wire E2E transfer/swap handlers
workUnits.notes: Creates internalExecutor.ts, replaces handleTransferTool with handleCompassTransfer (E2E), replaces handleSwapTool with handleCompassSwap (policy-only + pending status). Stop for user review after this phase.
Adds mcpToolRegistry.test.ts and mcpToolCallRouter.test.ts with E2E transfer, non-devnet block, and swap-pending-builder scenarios. Stop for final review after verification.

tasks.title: Add COMPASS_TRANSFER and COMPASS_SWAP to MCP_TOOL_NAMES in mcpToolContracts.ts
acceptanceCriteria: MCP_TOOL_NAMES.COMPASS_TRANSFER === 'compass_transfer'
MCP_TOOL_NAMES.COMPASS_SWAP === 'compass_swap'
Internal-only names remain: EXECUTE_APPROVED_ACTION, SIGN_AND_SEND_TRANSACTION, CREATE_CONDITIONAL_BUY_SOL
ExecuteMcpTransferInput type defined with candidateId, network, transactionPayload, approvalProof

tasks.title: Add userConfirmedRisk to COMPASS_TRANSFER and COMPASS_SWAP input schemas in mcpToolContracts.ts
acceptanceCriteria: COMPASS_TRANSFER_SCHEMA includes optional userConfirmedRisk boolean
COMPASS_SWAP_SCHEMA includes optional userConfirmedRisk boolean

tasks.title: Add E2E transfer input type with userConfirmedRisk in mcpToolContracts.ts
acceptanceCriteria: CompassTransferInput type mirrors existing transfer fields plus userConfirmedRisk
CompassSwapInput type mirrors existing swap fields plus userConfirmedRisk
Types exported for use in router and tests

tasks.title: Rename GUARDED_TRANSFER_SOL entry to COMPASS_TRANSFER in mcpToolRegistry.ts
acceptanceCriteria: GUARDED_TRANSFER_SOL renamed to COMPASS_TRANSFER
GUARDED_SWAP_SOL_USDC renamed to COMPASS_SWAP
Description updated to reflect E2E flow (not 'prepare')

tasks.title: Remove EXECUTE_APPROVED_ACTION, SIGN_AND_SEND_TRANSACTION, CREATE_CONDITIONAL_BUY_SOL from public MCP_TOOL_REGISTRY
acceptanceCriteria: listMcpTools() no longer includes execute_approved_action
listMcpTools() no longer includes sign_and_send_transaction
listMcpTools() no longer includes create_conditional_buy_sol
Internal tool entries preserved if needed for backward compat

tasks.title: Update COMPASS_TRANSFER and COMPASS_SWAP registry entries with userConfirmedRisk schema
acceptanceCriteria: COMPASS_TRANSFER registry entry inputSchema includes userConfirmedRisk
COMPASS_SWAP registry entry inputSchema includes userConfirmedRisk

tasks.title: Create back/services/mcp/internalExecutor.ts with extracted execution logic
acceptanceCriteria: Function: executeMcpTransfer(input: ExecuteMcpTransferInput) with parse payload, devnet bypass guard, idempotency consume, signer create, signAndSend, audit
Idempotency consumed right before signing (not after building)
Devnet bypass guard calls pendingTransactionStore.consumeByCandidateId
On-chain approvalProof verification for non-devnet paths
Returns { ok, signature?, reason?, auditId }

tasks.title: Replace handleTransferTool with handleCompassTransfer in mcpToolCallRouter.ts
acceptanceCriteria: Route MCP_TOOL_NAMES.COMPASS_TRANSFER -> handleCompassTransfer
Parse input including userConfirmedRisk
Apply default actorWallet from local signer
Evaluate transfer gateway
If DENY: return deny result without building/executing
If REQUIRE_ADDITIONAL_CONTEXT: return context result
If REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL on devnet + userConfirmedRisk=true: continue to execution
If REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL on devnet without userConfirmedRisk: ask for confirmation
If REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL on non-devnet: block with 'external approval required' message
Build unsigned transfer transaction via buildSolTransferTransactionPayload
Call internalExecutor.executeMcpTransfer
Return signature/status result

tasks.title: Replace handleSwapTool with handleCompassSwap in mcpToolCallRouter.ts
acceptanceCriteria: Route MCP_TOOL_NAMES.COMPASS_SWAP -> handleCompassSwap
Parse input including userConfirmedRisk
Evaluate swap gateway (existing logic)
Return gateway decision (ALLOW/DENY/etc) plus data.executionStatus: 'pending_builder'
Do NOT build or execute swap transaction
Non-devnet still blocks with external approval message if policy requires it

tasks.title: Remove public execute_approved_action routing from mcpToolCallRouter.ts switch
acceptanceCriteria: EXECUTE_APPROVED_ACTION no longer handled as a public tool route
Internal logic from handleExecuteApprovedActionTool extracted into internalExecutor.ts
Existing internal-only handling preserved for backward compat during transition

tasks.title: Update denyRegisteredTool message to reference compass_transfer and compass_swap
acceptanceCriteria: Deny message updated: route through compass_transfer or compass_swap instead of guard + execute_approved_action pattern

tasks.title: Create back/services/__tests__/mcpToolRegistry.test.ts with public list assertions
acceptanceCriteria: listMcpTools() returns compass_transfer and compass_swap
listMcpTools() does NOT include execute_approved_action
listMcpTools() does NOT include sign_and_send_transaction
listMcpTools() does NOT include create_conditional_buy_sol
listMcpTools() includes read-only helpers: get_usdc_sol_quote, quote_swap, simulate_conditional_buy_oracle_check

tasks.title: Create back/services/__tests__/mcpToolCallRouter.test.ts with E2E transfer and swap scenarios
acceptanceCriteria: Devnet transfer succeeds with userConfirmedRisk=true: returns ok=true with signature
Devnet transfer without userConfirmedRisk when approval required: returns REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL
Non-devnet transfer blocked with external approval message
Transfer DENY returns clear denial without executing
Swap returns ALLOW with data.executionStatus: 'pending_builder'
Hidden internal tool call rejected as unavailable

tasks.title: Add unit tests for internalExecutor.ts
acceptanceCriteria: Idempotency consumed before signing
Devnet bypass guard rejects non-Compass-built payloads
Signer adapter called with correct unsigned transaction
Signature returned on success
